personality_one_liner: A bold, appetizing, premium fast-food experience with chunky tactile components and vibrant accents.

spacing.rule: Generous tactile padding. Chunky tap areas for fast navigation. Use md/lg for cards.

do's: Bottom tab bar when content scrolls behind it

screens.name: Splash/Auth
screens.purpose: A bold, appetizing entry showing off the brand and enticing immediate login.
screens.layout: Full-bleed hero photo (combo_meal) with a gradient scrim bottom fade. Large logo/typography 'Mezbaan Restro'. Chunky pill-shaped CTAs (Login/Signup) in brandPrimary and brandSecondary.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Showcase featured promotions, quick categories, and popular items for fast ordering.

states.loading: Skeleton loaders for banners and cards
states.error: Failed to load menu, retry button

screens.layout: Sticky glass header with delivery address. Horizontal scrolling promo banners. Horizontal row of pill-shaped category chips (brandTertiary). Vertical list of 'Popular Items' using large cards with appetizing imagery. A sticky bottom Cart CTA floats above the bottom tabs if items are in cart.

screens.name: Category/Menu listing
screens.purpose: Browse full menu with easy filtering and fast add-to-cart actions.

states.error: Failed to load items, retry button

screens.layout: Sticky category filter pills at the top. Two-column grid or single large column of product cards. Cards feature food images, price (high contrast), and a chunky '+' icon button.

screens.name: Product Detail
screens.purpose: View item details and configure customizations (size, crust, add-ons).

states.error: Failed to load details, retry button

screens.layout: Edge-to-edge hero image with bottom scrim for readability. Title, description, and tags. Sections for Customizations (e.g. 8-inch pizza base, extra cheese). Sticky bottom CTA 'Add to Cart - ₹X' always visible.

screens.name: Cart
screens.purpose: Review order, apply coupons, and proceed to checkout.

states.error: Failed to update cart, retry button

screens.layout: List of cart items with quantity steppers. Progress bar for 'Free delivery above ₹250'. Section for Coupons/Offers. Order total breakdown. Sticky bottom 'Proceed to Checkout' CTA.

screens.name: Checkout

states.error: Payment failed card with retry CTA

screens.layout: Address selection card, delivery instructions input, payment method selection. Sticky bottom 'Place Order' CTA.

screens.name: Order Tracking
screens.purpose: Pizza Hut style animated step-by-step live tracking.

states.error: Failed to load tracking, retry button

screens.layout: Top section: Order # & ETA. Middle: Animated progress wheel/stepper (Received -> Preparing -> Packed -> Out For Delivery -> Delivered). Bottom: Descriptive card for current status (e.g. 'Your food is being packed'). Map view expands when driver is assigned.

screens.name: Orders History
screens.purpose: View past orders and repeat them.
screens.layout: List of past order cards containing order date, items summary, total price, and a prominent 'Repeat Last Order' CTA on the most recent card.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Manage account, wallet, loyalty points, and referrals.
screens.layout: Top section with user info. Grid of 2 cards for 'Wallet Balance' and 'Loyalty Points'. List of settings rows for Address, Refer & Earn, Settings, Logout. Use brandTertiary tinted icons for each row.

screens.name: Admin Dashboard
screens.purpose: Overview of daily operations and quick access to management.
screens.layout: Utility focused but matches brand colors. Top stat cards (Total Orders, Revenue). List of 'Pending Orders' for quick action.

screens.name: Admin Menu Manager
screens.layout: List of menu items with thumbnail, price, and a toggle for 'In Stock / Out of Stock'. FAB to add new item.

screens.name: Admin Order Manager
screens.purpose: Update order statuses moving through the flow.
screens.layout: Segmented control for statuses (New, Preparing, Packed, Out). List of order cards with a primary CTA to advance status (e.g., 'Mark as Prepared').

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow 4 Tactile / Playful design rules: chunky pill-shaped CTAs, generous padding (md/lg), large tap areas, and slightly rounded thick cards.
Brand Colors strict mapping: brandPrimary = #B71C1C (Dark Red), brandSecondary = #F4C430 (Gold Yellow). Use Dark Red for primary actions and Gold Yellow for prominent highlights/badges.

Implement the 'Pizza Hut style' order tracker using a step-by-step progress wheel with micro-animations. Clearly display status text for 'Received -> Preparing -> Packed -> Out For Delivery -> Delivered'.
Always place text over hero images using a top-to-bottom gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse) to guarantee contrast.
Use Phosphor filled icons for a chunky, premium fast-food look.
Implement sticky cart CTA on Home and Menu screens when cart has items, anchored above bottom tabs.
For Dark Mode, use the provided dark theme colors (#121212 base) while ensuring the Gold and Red accents remain highly vibrant.
